mapper.insert: INSERT INTO profile (userid, favcategory, langpref, mylistopt, banneropt) VALUES (#{profile.userId}, #{profile.favouriteCategoryId}, #{profile.languagePreference}, #{profile.listOption}, #{profile.bannerOption}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE favcategory = #{profile.favouriteCategoryId}, langpref = #{profile.languagePreference}, mylistopt = #{profile.listOption}, banneropt = #{profile.bannerOption}
